meta_title: For Founders: debugging with AI to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Debugging with AI to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to leverage AI debugging to overcome a lack of portfolio. A beginner-friendly roadmap using Antigravity and Claude Code for rapid SaaS validation.
content.answer_block: Transform your lack of a portfolio into a competitive advantage by using AI-driven debugging to build, ship, and iterate faster. By mastering Antigravity and Claude Code, you can diagnose complex logic errors, refactor legacy boilerplate, and demonstrate technical depth, proving your ability to build production-grade SaaS products to investors.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the founder's greatest adversary. You have the vision, the drive, and the market insight, but when you look at your GitHub profile, you see a desert of zero commits. The industry demands a portfolio, yet you are drowning in complex bugs that stall your MVP before it even reaches the public eye.

The tide is turning. With modern AI-assisted debugging, you no longer need to spend weeks deciphering stack traces. You can now treat your codebase as a living entity, using intelligent agents to pinpoint bottlenecks and optimize performance in real-time. This isn't just about fixing code; it's about accelerating your velocity to market and building a portfolio that commands authority.

steps.title: Analyze and Map the Technical Debt
steps.description: Before fixing, you must identify where your code fails. Use AI to scan your existing directory and surface architectural inconsistencies.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current project directory, identify the top three architectural anti-patterns, and provide a refactoring roadmap that improves readability and performance.

steps.title: Automated Debugging of Critical Flows
steps.description: Isolate the authentication or payment flow—the most critical parts of your SaaS—and use AI to stress-test the logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior QA engineer. Review the authentication module for potential race conditions or security vulnerabilities and suggest a robust fix.

steps.title: Refactoring for Scalability
steps.description: A portfolio project must look like production code. Refactor your spaghetti code into clean, modular components.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the current codebase to follow clean architecture principles, specifically focusing on decoupling the business logic from the UI layer.

steps.title: Implementing Unit Test Suites
steps.description: Nothing proves capability like a well-tested project. Use AI to generate comprehensive test coverage for your core features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a suite of Jest tests for the existing user-onboarding flow, covering both edge cases and happy paths.

steps.title: Documenting the 'Why' for Portfolio
steps.description: Your portfolio needs a story. Use AI to generate high-quality README files that explain the technical challenges you solved.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a professional README.md that highlights the problem-solving process, technical stack choices, and the specific bugs I resolved in this project.

pro_tips: Treat your commits as a journal: Always include a 'Why' in your commit messages so future employers/investors see your decision-making process.
Use Claude Code in a separate branch to experiment with radical refactors; if it breaks, simply discard the branch.
Focus on the 'Happy Path' first: Don't get stuck debugging obscure edge cases until your core value proposition is functional.
Audit AI suggestions: Never trust an AI output blindly; always verify the logic with a manual test run to ensure you actually understand the fix.
Build in public: Share the 'Before/After' of your debugging sessions on LinkedIn or X to build social proof alongside your code.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a platform like Vercel or Railway, link the repository to your personal site, and begin building your second SaaS module to demonstrate consistent development velocity.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs dictate your launch timeline. Leverage these tools to build a portfolio that proves you are a high-velocity, production-ready founder. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
